# Pixora Studios

Pixora Studios is a premier web design and development agency based in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India. We specialize in building high-performance, SEO-optimized websites and digital solutions for local businesses including clinics, restaurants, cafes, gyms, and salons.

## Core Offerings

- **Custom Web Development**: Tailor-made websites built with modern technologies like Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
- **Digital QR Menu**: A contactless, mobile-optimized menu solution for restaurants and cafes with instant update capabilities.
- **Booking Systems**: Integrated appointment and reservation systems for healthcare and hospitality sectors.
- **SEO & Speed Optimization**: Every project includes comprehensive on-page SEO and performance tuning.

## Featured Portfolio Projects

- **Bangalore Express**: Restaurant/Cafe website near KIIT, Bhubaneswar built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS featuring dynamic menu, booking form, and AEO. Live at `https://bangalore-express.pixorastudios.com`
- **SOVEREIGN**: Premium nightlife brand and lounge website in Patia, Bhubaneswar featuring elegant dark-aesthetic multi-page architecture. Live at `https://sovereign.pixorastudios.com`

## Location & Service Area

- **Primary Base**: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India.
- **Service Area**: Serving businesses locally in Bhubaneswar and across Odisha, as well as remote clients throughout India.

## Key Information

- **Pricing Model**: Transparent, one-time investment with 6 months of free support. No recurring monthly retainers for website builds.
- **Turnaround Time**: Standard business websites are typically delivered within 2-4 weeks.
- **Founder**: Debidutta Acharya.
